fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the corresponding resource.

fields.name: Resource Group No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the corresponding resource group assigned to the resource.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date for which the capacity entry is valid.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity that is calculated and recorded. The capacity is in the unit of measure.
